description_long: This object is a rectangular, two-story building with a flat roof and a weathered, tan stucco exterior. The front facade features two arched doorways, each covered by a fabric awning—one red and one gray—supported by thin poles. In front of the building, there are long wooden tables displaying pottery, food, and other market goods, suggesting a bustling street market scene. The upper story has shuttered windows and a small patch of exposed stonework, adding to the rustic, historical character. A wooden ladder leans against one side, and the rear and sides of the building are mostly plain, with minimal architectural detail. The overall appearance evokes a Mediterranean or Middle Eastern urban market setting.
description: A two-story tan stucco building with arched doorways, colorful fabric awnings, and market tables in front, evoking a lively street market scene.
description_view_0: The front view shows a plain tan wall with a single shuttered window and no visible market activity.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a ladder, a patch of exposed stonework, and the side of the market tables and awnings.
description_view_2: The main facade displays two arched doorways with red and gray awnings, shuttered windows above, and market tables filled with goods.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the length of the building and the market tables extending outward, with minimal architectural detail.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the building facade above arched doorways
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid color fabric with no visible pattern, one red and one gray
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with minimal trim, no decorative features
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with vertical support poles
